schema.title: Response List Projects Api Projects Get

post.description: Copy manuscript_config.json and characters.json from source to target project.

get.description: 列出某项目（或某镜）的所有资产 — 用于前端 URL 寻址，避免 base64。

E1: 查项目的事件流。可按 trace_id / task_id / scene_id / level 过滤。
用于"任务回放"——选一次任务的 trace_id 就能看到完整时间线。
A1: 返回项目级状态机视图（项目阶段 + scene 计数 + 资产计数）。
Serve a single PNG image file directly (avoids large base64 JSON payloads).

put.description: Save a single image slot file to disk + A2 双写到 scene_assets。
Rebuild images.json from the provided slot_keys list + save counts/selected.

get.description: 生成前校验工作流：ComfyUI 是否在线 + 节点 class_type 是否齐 + 资源引用统计。

schema.title: Response Get Workflows Api Image Engine Workflows Get

post.description:
Launch len(frames) * gen_count concurrent generation tasks.
Multiplex all events into one SSE stream.

Event types: queued | progress | completed | error | batch_done
Each carries: scene_id, frame_type, slot_index
completed carries: images = [{filename, data(base64), type}]

get.description: C2: 走统一 adapter，路由 engine_type 的分支逻辑收敛进 adapter factory。

schema.title: Response Get Voice Refs Api Audio Engine Voice Refs Get
Response Get Emotion Refs Api Audio Engine Emotion Refs Get

post.description: Merge clips for one scene into a single WAV (with pre/post silence).

Generate a single TTS clip with Microsoft Edge neural voices.
Returns base64 MP3 by default; pass format="wav" for stitch-scene compatible WAV.

逐一测试 Microsoft Edge neural voices；返回 {voice: ok/err}，
并将通过的 voice 列表写入 settings.audio_engine.msedge_available_voices。

schema.title: Response Get Video Workflows Api Video Engine Workflows Get

get.description: 返回 BGM 元信息：是否存在、文件名。

put.description: 上传 BGM。前端读取本地文件 → base64 → 此接口。

post.description: Concatenate all scene MP4 files in order into one final video using ffmpeg concat demuxer.

get.description: Return subtitle script lines extracted from the project's scenes (dialogue / description).

post.description: SSE stream: normalize video → extract audio → align → write SRT.
SSE：按顺序跑所有 stage。前端接事件流，实时显示进度。

schema.title: Response List Templates Api Templates Get

get.description: SSE: 实时推送新日志行。

SSE：先回放历史事件（id > last_event_id），再实时推送新事件。

- 断网重连：前端 EventSource 自动带上 Last-Event-ID header → 服务端从那以后回放
- 历史持久化在 SQLite events 表，任务结束后仍可看完整时间线
